Shield Team","custom:security-contact":"security@quantumshield.io","custom:version":"0.1.0","details":"IMPL-012/013: Implements proof compression for Week 10 targets  ## Overview This contract provides compression for STARK proofs to reduce calldata costs. Target: 50%+ compression ratio for proof data.  ## Compression Techniques 1. **Merkle Path Compression**: Run-length encoding for repeated patterns 2. **Evaluation Compression**: Delta encoding for sequential values 3. **Challenge Re-computation**: Store seeds instead of full challenges  ## CP-1 Compliance (Quantum Resistance) - Uses ONLY SHA3-256 (FIPS 202) for all hash operations - keccak256 is PROHIBITED - Domain separation for security  ## Format Compressed data format: [4 bytes: version] [4 bytes: flags] [variable: compressed data]
